description:
This intermediate-to-advanced PostgreSQL quiz tests knowledge of both common and lesser-known features, including built-in aggregates, type casting, and constraints, with a friendly, engaging teaching tone designed to challenge and reinforce practical skills.
Topics: Built-in aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, PostgreSQL features, Gotchas and edge cases
Audience: Developers and database administrators with existing PostgreSQL experience seeking to deepen their expertise and troubleshoot real-world scenarios.
